emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] often needs more than one approach to resolve
emails.preview: A plain explanation worth your 2 minutes
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to explain something about the pattern in your assessment that I think will be useful.

Chinese medicine and functional medicine share a premise that Western conventional care rarely applies: the body is a whole system, and symptoms emerge from disruptions in multiple interacting pathways — not from a single malfunction.

For a pattern like yours — with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] as a central complaint — the most effective approach almost always requires addressing two things simultaneously: the systemic biochemical root (which functional medicine identifies through targeted testing and addresses through nutrition, supplementation, and lifestyle) and the energetic and nervous system component (which acupuncture addresses by directly regulating the pathways that drive inflammatory and stress responses).

Standard care typically offers one piece of this. The symptom quiets but the underlying pattern continues.

At IWC Jacksonville, we bring both lenses to every patient — not as separate protocols but as an integrated approach that addresses the full picture. That is what makes the results more durable.

— Dr. Melissa Levy Ellis, DACM, AP
Integrative Wellness Center of Jacksonville | Jacksonville Beach, FL | iwcjacksonville.com

[Book a New Patient Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

emails.subject: A patient with your pattern — what shifted with an integrated approach
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One final note before I close the loop on your assessment.

A woman in her early 40s came to our practice after years of chronic pain, fatigue, and hormonal disruption that had not responded fully to conventional treatment. She had tried acupuncture briefly elsewhere and felt it 'sort of helped.' She had been on hormonal support with partial results.

After a full IWC intake — combining a functional medicine assessment with a Chinese medicine diagnostic evaluation — we identified a pattern where her systemic inflammatory state was continuously undermining the hormonal treatment she had been receiving. The two problems were interacting in a way that had not been accounted for.

We built an integrated plan: a course of targeted acupuncture to regulate the inflammatory and stress response, combined with functional medicine interventions addressing the root of the inflammation itself.

Three months in, the hormonal treatment was working significantly better. Her pain had reduced substantially. She described herself as 'feeling better than I have in years — and I did not think that was still possible for me.'

Individual results vary. Outcomes depend on many personal factors and are not guaranteed. But the consistent pattern at IWC: when the full picture is addressed with the right combination of approaches, the body can respond in ways that a single modality alone could not produce.

Your assessment is the starting point. We would love to work with you.

— Dr. Melissa Levy Ellis, DACM, AP
Integrative Wellness Center of Jacksonville | Jacksonville Beach, FL | iwcjacksonville.com

Disclaimer: Individual results vary. This is not medical advice.

[Schedule Your New Patient Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — iwcjacksonville.com
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Global Rank | #6,094,358 |
| Keywords Ranked | 325 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~24 visits |
| Traffic Value | $19/mo |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 21 |
| SERP Features Traffic | ~0 visits/mo |

---

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: RANKED BUT INVISIBLE
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The site ranks for 325 keywords yet delivers only ~24 visits per month — a near-total disconnect between presence and performance.

- **0** keywords at position #1
- **1** keyword at positions #2–3
- **20** keywords at positions #4–10
- **29** keywords at positions #11–20

Rankings exist across the board; the problem is depth — nothing is authoritative enough to earn meaningful clicks.

---

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
The site appears in **31 AI Overview SERPs** but is cited in **0** of them. That means AI-generated answers are being triggered by topics this practice covers — and a competitor is getting the credit every single time. This is a compounding visibility leak as AI search continues to grow.

---

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: JACKSONVILLE LOCAL INTENT CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 9] holistic medicine jacksonville fl — 210/mo, KD:0
- [pos 17] holistic doctor jacksonville fl — 170/mo, KD:45
- [pos 16] glutathione jacksonville — 170/mo, KD:6
- [pos 15] holistic dr jacksonville fl — 140/mo, KD:44
- [pos 15] functional medicine jacksonville — 140/mo, KD:26

These are the keywords most likely to bring in a paying patient — local searchers with clear intent — yet the practice sits between position 9 and 17 for all of them, leaving the front door unmanned.

---

⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4–10)
──────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 6] what is blood stagnation — 210/mo, KD:10
- [pos 9] holistic medicine jacksonville fl — 210/mo, KD:0
- [pos 10] blood stasis chinese medicine — 140/mo, KD:6
- [pos 10] gi map stool test price — 110/mo, KD:3
- [pos 4] wellness center jacksonville fl — 110/mo, KD:30
- [pos 9] define blood stasis — 110/mo, KD:25

→ **Highest priority:** 'holistic medicine jacksonville fl' sits at position 9 with a keyword difficulty of 0 — this is the single lowest-effort, highest-local-intent move available right now.

---

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────
| Metric | iwcjacksonville.com | wildwoodmedicine.com |
|---|---|---|
| Keywords Ranked | 325 | 324 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~24 visits | 166 visits |
| Traffic Value | $19/mo | $153/mo |

Nearly identical keyword footprints — but wildwoodmedicine.com converts that into **7× more traffic** and **8× more traffic value**. The gap is not in discovery; it is in content depth and ranking positions.

---

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────

**1. CAPTURE THE LOCAL PATIENT**
Strengthen the core location pages targeting Jacksonville holistic and functional medicine terms. 'Holistic medicine jacksonville fl' sits at position 9 with KD:0 — one focused page optimization should push it to the top 3 within 60 days.

**2. DOMINATE THE BLOOD STASIS CLUSTER**
Four related terms (blood stasis, blood stagnation, blood stasis chinese medicine, stagnant blood chinese medicine) are scattered across positions 6–19. Consolidate them under one authoritative pillar page to unify ranking signals within 90 days.

**3. EARN AI OVERVIEW CITATIONS**
The practice triggers 31 AI Overview SERPs and is cited in 0. Add structured, directly-answerable content to existing pages — specific definitions, costs, and clinical explanations — so AI summaries pull from this site rather than bypassing it entirely.
